that is legally privileged. This Information is Intended only for the use of the individual or entity
named above, The authorized recipient of this information is prohibited from disclosing this

destroy the information after Its stated need has been fulfilled."
If you are not the Intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any disclosure, copying,

and arrange for the return or destruction of these documents,

7325 S. Pecos Rd. Ste 102 Las Vegas, Nevada 89120
To our valued home health partner,
1 would like to refer my patient, FRANK MENDOZA for home health evaluation and treatment
The diagnosis for this patient is Age related debility.
Below are my patient's current demographics for your reference:
Please feel free to contact pur office at (702) 982-6402 if you have any questions.
Provider: Chamian, Noel M, MD (Supervisor: Chamian, Noel M, MD; Assistant: Salazar, Asencion, MA)
Electronically signed by Noel Chamian, MD on 04/30/2024 10:19:03 AM
CC: Mr. MENDOZA is a 88 year old male. This is a follow-up visit.
Mr. MENDOZA presents with essential (primary) hypertension. This was first diagnosed several years ago. He is not using
any nonpharmacologic treatment modalities. He is tolerating the medication well without side effects. Compliance with
Follow up of asthma. It began unknown. Prior work-up has included See Docman for result of the test..
Follow up of pneumoconiosis due to asbestos and other mineral fibers. It began unknown. There are no associated
symptoms. Prior work-up has included See Docman for result of the test..
Follow up of age-related physical debility. It began years ago.
All other systems were reviewed and nothing pertinent except for the above mentioned symptom/s.

sitting); sCr: 0.8 mg/dL; GFR: 68.0302 Sat: 96 % (room air)Pain Index: 0
GENERAL: well developed, well nourished, in no apparent distress
EYES: lids and conjunctiva are normal; pupils and irises are normal;
E/N/T: normal external ears and nose;; normal external auditory canals and tympanic membranes; Hearing: grossly normal
Nasal Septum/Mucosa: turbinates are markedly swollen bilaterally; Lips, Teeth and Gums: normal; Oropharynx: normal
NECK: Neck is supple with full range of motion; thyroid is normal to palpation;
RESPIRATORY: normal respiratory rate and pattern with no distress; decreased breath sounds in the RLL; ; expiratory
CARDIOVASCULAR: normal rate and rhythm without murmurs; normal $1 and S2 heart sounds with no S3, S4, rubs, or
clicks; carotids: 2+ amplitude, no bruits; abdominal aorta appears to be of normal size and is without bruits; 2+ pedal
GASTROINTESTINAL: no masses palpated; nontender; no organomegaly
LYMPHATIC: no enlargement of cervical nodes; no supraclavicular, suboccipital, periauricular or other nodes;
MUSCULOSKELETAL: digits/nails: no clubbing, cyanosis, or evidence of ischemia or infection; normal gait; grossly normal
tone and muscle strength; full, painless range of motion of all major muscle groups and joints no laxity or subluxation of
any joints; no masses, effusions, misalignment, crepitus, or tenderness in major joints;
SKIN: no ulcerations, lesions or rashes no skin thickening, induration, or subcutaneous nodules;
NEUROLOGIC: cranial nerves II-XII grossly intact; normal DTR's elicited in biceps, triceps, supinator, knee, and ankle jerk;
sensation: normal to touch and pinprick; vibration and proprioception senses intact;
PSYCHIATRIC: mental status: alert and oriented X 3; appropriate affect and demeanor; recent and remote memory are
